dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, for too long the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} ground the {quest_stakes} into the dirt. {quest_origin} has pushed people past their breaking point.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We intend to {quest_action} and challenge the authority at the {quest_focus}. But we cannot do it alone: we need people willing to stand with us. Speak to the workers near {location_hint} and gauge who can be trusted. The {enemy_type} serving the oppressors are watching everyone.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is not recklessness: it is survival. Without change, there is nothing left for us here.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} held the {quest_stakes} under their boot for too long. They rule through fear and force, but they have a weakness.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. Their strength depends on the {quest_focus}, and without it, their grip loosens. The {enemy_type} guard the area {location_hint}. Cut through them and break their hold.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we cut their supply line, the people will find the courage to stand up. This is how it starts.

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. Since {quest_origin} began draining us dry, the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_has} been organizing in secret. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} everywhere.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need someone the patrols do not recognize to {quest_action} near the {quest_focus}. The {enemy_type} have a garrison {location_hint} that keeps the resistance pinned down. Thin their numbers so our people can move freely.
dialogueChunks.outro: If the {quest_threat} intercepts our plans, people will die. But if we break through, everything changes. You would earn {quest_reward_hint}.
